title: atractylodes chinensis
intro: Atractylodes chinensis, also known as Bai Zhu, is a type of plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to warm the body and improve digestion. The health benefits of Atractylodes chinensis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving immune function, and regulating blood sugar levels. Atractylodes chinensis is often prepared in herbal teas, decoctions, and tinctures, as well as being used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
